Configuration for building Flask documentation on Read the Docs using Ubuntu 24.04 and Python 3.13.

# Purpose
This configuration file specifies the build environment and commands for a software project. It sets the `os` to `ubuntu-24.04` and uses Python version `3.13`. The build process includes adding the `uv` plugin, installing the latest version of `uv`, and setting it as the global version. The final command runs `uv` to build documentation using `sphinx-build`, outputting the results to the directory specified by the `READTHEDOCS_OUTPUT` environment variable.
